parameters.content:
## Customize SOQL Queries
If you have a custom health score field (e.g., `Health_Score__c`), add it to the **"Query Stale Accounts"** SOQL and reference it in the Code node.

Default queries assume:
- Churned = Opportunity Stage 'Closed Lost' in last 7 days
- Renewals = CloseDate in NEXT_N_DAYS:7
- Escalations = Cases with Priority = 'High' created this week
- Stale = No Account activity in 21 days

## Change Slack Channel
Open the **"Post Weekly Digest"** node.
Change `#cs-team` to your channel name.
Make sure the Slack bot is invited to that channel.

parameters.query: SELECT Id, Name, Amount, Account.Name, Owner.Name, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE StageName = 'Closed Lost' AND CloseDate = LAST_N_DAYS:7 ORDER BY CloseDate DESC

SELECT Id, Name, Amount, Account.Name, Owner.Name, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity WHERE StageName IN ('Renewal Due', 'Renewal Negotiation', 'Renewal At Risk') AND CloseDate <= NEXT_N_DAYS:7 ORDER BY CloseDate ASC
SELECT Id, Subject, Priority, Status, Account.Name, Owner.Name, CreatedDate FROM Case WHERE Priority = 'High' AND Status != 'Closed' AND CreatedDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:7 ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
SELECT Id, Name, Owner.Name, LastActivityDate FROM Account WHERE Type = 'Customer' AND LastActivityDate <= LAST_N_DAYS:21 ORDER BY LastActivityDate ASC LIMIT 10
